resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def repeatedCharacter(self, s: str) -> str:
        seen = set()
        for char in s:
            if char in seen:
                return char
            seen.add(char)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Utilizes a set to track seen characters, allowing for efficient lookup and return of the first repeated character.
